chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special STRA 120 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No.983/2019. 02.10.2025 Mr. Fahad Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the applicant, which is taken on record. Per learned counsel the questions raised in this reference application have been determined by the Division Bench of this court in Fatima Fertilizers case reported as 2020 PTD 484. Counsel states that the edict is binding on the court, therefore, for the same reasoning and rationale as in aforementioned judgment, the questions framed herein be decided against the applicant and the reference application be dismissed, subject to right of appeal of the applicant. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Tribunal, as required per section 63 of the Sindh Sales Tax on Services Act, 2011. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
